feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sales Employee
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to configure the Partner Function (Sales Employee) as a Supplier. However, while assigning the Account Group to the Sales Employee partner function, the system is displaying only Customer Account Groups and not Supplier Account Groups.

This issue persists even after assigning the Partner Type “LI (Vendor)” to the Sales Employee partner function.

I have attached screenshots for your reference.

Could you please advise on the possible cause of this issue and let me know if I am missing any configuration steps? This is quite urgent, as I am currently handling a live issue.

Your prompt support would be highly appreciated.

Best regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: BP Grouping : Telephone number Mandatory
entry.content:
BP Grouping : Telephone number Mandatory

We not found any options to make mandatory the Telephone number for BP Grouping

entry.title: Clarifications on HANA DB access in SAP Private Cloud (RISE)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

Good Day !

 

I require your support to clarify few points regarding the our current RISE Migration Project.

 

The project as follows: 

  • Migrate On-Premises EHP07 on HANA (Suite On HANA) 2.0 SP05 to S4HANA 2025 HANA 2.0 SP08 Private cloud.

 

  • In the current live environment, User are directly accessing the HANA DB for analytical purposes through the following methods:

 

  1. HANA Calculation Views – Users log in to Analysis for Office (AFO) and connect directly to the HANA DB using HANA user IDs to access reports.There are 10 HANA DB user IDs we created in old DB and each user has separate calculation view access.
  2. MS Fabric Integration with HANA DB – MS Fabric retrieves data directly from HANA tables using SQL queries through a read-only HANA DB user. This integration is currently configured using the HANA ODBC connector and the On-Premises Data Gateway.

 

I need to know whether the same level of direct HANA DB access will be available for users after the RISE migration? or the HANA DB users will be removed after the post processing and only keeps the standard HANA DB users such as SYSTEM DB, Schema users?

 

If the old user IDs stay remain, will the authorization remains same?

 

Your clarification on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

 

Best Regards,

Nishatharu Weerakkodi

entry.title: Costs related to digital access resulting from integrations with non-SAP applications
entry.content: If I have third-party systems that I want to integrate with SAP S/4HANA Private Edition 2023, I know there are costs associated with Digital Access per document created. Can I save these costs by using an intermediate SAP HANA Cloud table in BTP for synchronous integrations, and for asynchronous integrations, using SFTP via unattended bots? Or could SAP still charge me for Digital Access during the audit?

entry.title: SQLMD: Cross Node Joins Analysis
entry.content:
When executing SQLMD for Cross Node Join analysis, the program needs an input file containing Tables and Nodes. 

How to generate this file using the data from HANA DB? Wherever I check in System tables/views, this field with Node information is marked as Internal Use only and always return empty result.

So, how to generate the file with Table & Node information required to execute SQLMD?

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BTP DMS to S4Hana ABAP configuration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 


We're planning to use our newly purchased SAP BTP DMS to store the SOFFCONT1 from HANA to save space.

 

Please advice which is the best option to choose in the repository section during the setup of SAP BTP DMS, is it "Internal repository" or "File share repository"?

 


The business requirement is to migrate the existing SOFFCONT1 data from HANA to DMS and ensure that it remains accessible for management and maintenance purposes. In the future, we also plan to reduce the stored data in accordance with the retention policy and periodically upload refreshed data from HANA.  

Appreciate your advice.

Thank you so much in advance.

 

-Jaspher

entry.title: Create Correspondence Adobe Forms
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we want to modernize our FI correspondences (Account Statement, Open Item List etc.) by moving them from SAPscript to Adobe Forms. The idea is to have a central CI master template (using SFP fragments) for our corporate design (logo, fonts, header/footer), and then only add the content-specific parts per correspondence type.
Is this possible in SAP Standard ? We are on a private Cloud System.

entry.title: tax calculation on transportation charges
entry.content: We want to calculate taxes on transportation charges.

entry.title: INFO UPDATE
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While i creating the PO the Info update option is automatically checked in the Item details. I dont want that option to be selected automatically. As i checked we can assign default values for a User in OMFI as Info update is No check. Is there are any other options to do this, like from masters or anyother configurations, if there any please suggest some.

In addition, the last PO price and conditions is copying to the new PO, is this because of Info record and Info update option. Or is this because of anyother process ?. Please clarify.

Best Regards,

Dinesh U

entry.title: Is it possible to select specific G/L accounts in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I would like to confirm whether SAP S/4HANA Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation provides any standard option to select specific G/L accounts for valuation execution.

Our requirement is to apply a different exchange rate logic / treatment for only a few specific G/L accounts, while the rest of the foreign currency valuation should follow the normal process.

From our review so far, in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation we could only identify selection parameters such as:

  • Company Code
  • Ledger
  • Valuation Area / Rule (depending on configuration)

However, we could not find any standard option to explicitly select individual G/L accounts in the valuation run.

We also noticed that some references in SAP documentation / community discussions seem to relate to classic Foreign Currency Valuation, not necessarily Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation.

So our questions are:

  1. Is there any standard functionality in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation to restrict or select specific G/L accounts for a valuation run?
  2. If not, is there any configuration-based workaround (for example via valuation rules, account determination, semantic tags, or separate setup) to achieve different treatment for selected G/L accounts?
  3. Has anyone handled a similar business requirement where only a subset of G/L accounts needed different exchange rate treatment in Advanced FCV?

System context:

  • SAP S/4HANA
  • Using Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
  • Requirement is for selected G/L accounts to have different valuation treatment than the rest

Any clarification or references to SAP documentation / notes would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Balance Sheet/Income Statement - Multidimensional - Not assigned Ledgers
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud and using the Balance Sheet / Income Statement – Multidimensional Report.

I have created a Financial Statement Version (FSV) for P&L reporting and assigned all relevant P&L G/L accounts properly.

However, in the report output, I can see a section called “Not Assigned”, which includes Balance Sheet G/L accounts. This is confusing for end users because the report is intended only for P&L reporting.

Is there any standard way to:

  • Hide Balance Sheet accounts from this report, or
  • Remove/suppress the “Not Assigned” section, or
  • Can you suggest any other tile for better P&L Report. 
  • Configure the report to show only P&L accounts based on FSV?

 

Attached Picture for your reference. 

 

Kindly suggest the best practice or standard solution in S/4HANA Private Cloud.

Thanks & Regards,

silambarasan R.

entry.title: Blocked bin don´t permit transfer
entry.content:
When I block a bin, the system prevents any output or transfer.

Is there a standard configuration that allows a blocked bin to perform transfers?

entry.title: Management Accounting Certification
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

I just passed the Management Accounting Certification Private Edition, the 2026 new format exam.

If anyone has any questions, or someone wants advice, hit me up.

This post comes as a return to the community after i got valuable information from here in order to pass the exam.

 

Cheerios!

entry.title: AATP using SBC with PAC using supply creation doesn't create temporary supplies
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

we are using S/4HANA private cloud 2025 with SP/ FP stack 01 (02/2026) FPS. Furthermore, we are using CDP in PP/DS. I tried to set up SBC with PAC using supply creation, but I don't get temporary supplies. 

I wanted to try SBC with PAC using supply creation for a simple MTO process using CDP. I'm aware that on level of the PAC check characteristics are not supported. But during supply creation on component level CDP is supported, right?

The set up: 


We are using availability check group Z1 for PAC. I copied from 01. Z2 is for PPAC which works perfectly fine for the same master data by the way. 

master data:

 

Availability check result: 
no supply creation

As mentioned before, for trying availabiltiy check type Z2 with PPAC works perfectly fine. Did I miss something?

What I wanted to try was a BOP simulation run after sales order creation since it was mentioned in some blocks that this is supported. I set it up and tried it but I then I saw that no temporary supplies were created which must have happened already before I tried BOP. 

Furthermore I found the learning journey: https://learning.sap.com/courses/exploring-advanced-production-planning-with-sap-s-4hana-pp-ds/exploring-supply-creation-based-confirmation-sbc--1

Under PPAC it is stated that the availability check results can be displayed in BOP monitor App. I guess this is only supported for SBC using PAC instead of PPAC, right?

 

BR

entry.title: Employee as BP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently in the Go-Live phase of our project, and the HR module has not yet been implemented. However, the customer has requested that their Sales Employees be created as Business Partners in the production system.

At present, can we create these Sales Employees as Business Partners without assigning the Employee role (BUP003)? If so, when SAP SuccessFactors (or the HR module) is implemented later, will it be possible to link these same Business Partner records to the HR employee master data instead of creating new records?

If this approach is feasible, I would appreciate guidance on the configurations, master data settings, and best practices that should be considered now to ensure a smooth future integration with SuccessFactors/HR. Specifically, I would like to understand any critical settings that should not be missed during the initial Business Partner creation process to avoid issues during employee synchronization and integration at a later stage.

Please share your recommendations and experiences.

Best Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Header Freight condition in Purchase order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a procurement scenario where the Purchase Order is created for the actual material supplier, while freight charges are maintained through separate freight condition types with a different freight supplier.

In this case, the PO document currency is maintained as USD, and the freight condition type is entered in QAR currency. The requirement is to post separate invoices for the material supplier and the freight supplier, with each invoice adopting the respective currency maintained in the PO:

  • Material Supplier Invoice – USD
  • Freight Supplier Invoice – QAR

Could you please advise on the configuration settings and process steps required to achieve this scenario? Specifically, I would like to understand how SAP handles multiple currencies for planned delivery costs and whether any additional configuration is required to ensure that the supplier invoices are posted in their respective currencies.

Your guidance would be highly appreciated.

Best Regards

Dinesh

entry.title: How to create a custom tile of a custom analytical query for specific Bookmark
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,

I have a scenario such that i want to create a custom tile for each bookmarks that i have made in a custom analytical query. 

For example - Query "ZTRIP_DETAILS" have bookmarks saved:-
1. " Billed Trips"
2. " Unbilled Trips"

So I want to Create custom insight tiles of both the bookmarks in s4hana private cloud such that if user for example search for " Billed Trips - Trip Details" then only billed bookmark should open as an application.

Note:- My SAP Version is 2022 and i am working in s4hana private cloud.

Could you guys please help me build tile for each bookmarks of the query?
Also i have attached an image for your reference.
Thank you in advance.

Thanks
Vishal 

SAP HANA, platform edition

entry.title: AI and Joule Upskilling Guidance for SAP Functional Consultants
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The topics listed below are related to AI and Joule and are highly relevant to SAP Functional Consultants. Could you please share recommended learning paths, course links, blogs, or documentation that provide step-by-step guidance, configuration details, and structured learning approaches for these areas?

I am particularly interested in learning about -

Generative AI (LLMs, embeddings, and vector databases)

Agentic AI (multi-agent systems, planning, and reasoning)

AI lifecycle management

Machine Learning algorithms (supervised and unsupervised learning)

Neural networks

Natural Language Processing (NLP)

Prompt engineering

AI evaluation frameworks

Any resources, learning roadmaps, hands-on tutorials, or SAP-specific guidance that can help build knowledge and practical expertise in these topics would be greatly appreciated.

Additionally, please consider both SAP Public Cloud and Private Cloud environments when sharing resources and guidance related to the above topics.

Thank you in advance for your support and recommendations.

Best regards,
Ashish

entry.title: In fiori, unable to select cached item from dropdown list
entry.content:
In fiori,  some users (at least 3 users using 3 different computer ) are unable to select cached item from dropdown list, but if they select items from the list (eg: Material list) populated from sap database it works fine.

It was working fine some 2 days ago, I have tried clearing the cache and closing the browser but nothing worked.

we tried it on chrome and edge.

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: I am not getting the option New Standard Catalog button in Launchpad App Manager (Cross Client).
entry.content:
Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Co... - SAP Community

I am not getting the option New Standard Catalog in Launchpad App Manager (Cross Client). As per the SAP link we have to do the steps from 9 onwards.
